docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MURAVSKAYA, NATALIYA AS TO DEFENDANT CHU, NEHEMIAH AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MURAVSKAYA, NATALIYA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHU, NEHEMIAH AN INDIVIDUAL $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,725.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
